comment: Pinned firmware images and helper binaries Bert downloads on demand. Update this file when publishing new artefacts; the runtime will then pull the new versions. See docs/firmware-release.md for the maintainer workflow.

hci.description: Zephyr hci_uart sample for nRF52840 USB Dongle. Built with Zephyr v3.7.0 + nRF Connect SDK toolchain. Exposes a virtual COM port speaking HCI at 1 Mbaud.

sniffer.description: Use Nordic's bundled firmware via `nrfutil install ble-sniffer`; Bert auto-discovers it under $NRFUTIL_HOME/share/nrfutil-ble-sniffer/firmware/.

tools.comment: Pre-built helper binaries. We use adafruit-nrfutil (a maintained fork of pc-nrfutil) bundled into a single executable via PyInstaller, so end users don't have to `pip install nrfutil` and pin click<8.0 (which conflicts with typer). Built by .github/workflows/build-dfu-tools.yml.

bert-dfu.description: adafruit-nrfutil bundled as a single static binary. Used for `pkg generate` and `dfu serial` against the nRF52840 USB Dongle's Open Bootloader.

platform_aliases._comment: Map host platforms we don't ship binaries for to ones that work via emulation. macOS Intel runs darwin-arm64 binaries via Rosetta 2.
